exercise.instruction: Write about your morning routine. Describe what you do after waking up.
guiding_points: Mention the time you wake up
Describe what you eat for breakfast
Tell about one activity you do after breakfast

model_answer.text: I wake up at six thirty every morning. I eat cereal with milk and a banana. I like to play with my dog for a little while. Then I get dressed and go downstairs for breakfast. I do this every morning before I go to school. This is part of my daily routine. I like to start my day this way.

common_mistakes: forgetting to use a verb to describe the action

metadata.theme: morning routine, waking up, breakfast habits, early day activities

exercise.instruction: Write about what you do after your alarm clock wakes you up.
guiding_points: Describe what you do when you wake up
Mention what you eat for breakfast
Tell us about one thing you do after breakfast

model_answer.text: I wake up at seven o'clock every morning. My alarm clock is loud. I eat breakfast with my family and drink juice. Then I brush my teeth and get ready for school. I do this every morning before I go to school. This is part of my daily routine. I like to start my day this way. It helps me feel ready for the day.

common_mistakes: forgetting to use the simple present tense

metadata.theme: alarm clock, getting out of bed, morning activities step by step

exercise.instruction: Write about your favorite indoor activity on a Home Day. Describe what you like to do and why you enjoy it.
guiding_points: Mention one thing you like to do indoors, such as reading, watching TV or drawing.
Describe why you like to do this activity, e.g., it's relaxing or fun.
Include one thing you like to eat or drink while doing this activity.

model_answer.text: I like to read books on Home Days. I find it relaxing and I can learn new things. I like to eat cookies while I read because they are sweet and tasty. I do this every morning before I go to school. This is part of my daily routine. I like to start my day this way. It helps me feel ready for the day.

grammar_points: present simple tense for habits and routines
simple adjectives to describe feelings and tastes
common_mistakes: forgetting to use the present simple tense

metadata.theme: staying at home, daily activities at home, relaxing, indoor routine

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your family. Tell us who lives with you and what they do.
guiding_points: Point 1: Write about who lives with you (family members)
Point 2: Describe what each family member does
Point 3: Add a simple detail about your family (e.g. where you live)

model_answer.text: I live with my mom and dad. My mom is a teacher and my dad works in a shop. We live in a small house with a garden. We spend a lot of time together as a family. I love my family very much. We help each other every day. My family makes me feel happy and safe. I think this is very good.

grammar_points: using the simple present tense for habits and routines
common_mistakes: forgetting to use the simple present tense
using the wrong article (e.g. 'a' instead of 'the')

metadata.theme: family members, describing family, simple relationships, who is in my family

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about what you do with your family and friends on Sundays.
guiding_points: Point 1: What you do with your family on Sundays (e.g., have breakfast together)
Point 2: What you do with your friends on Sundays (e.g., play games)
Point 3: A simple detail about a favorite Sunday activity (e.g., eating your favorite food)
Point 4: Where you spend time with your family and friends (e.g., at home, in the park)

model_answer.text: I have breakfast with my family on Sundays. My friends and I play games together in the park. I like eating sandwiches and drinking lemonade with my friends. We have a lot of fun in the park on Sundays. We spend a lot of time together as a family. I love my family very much. We help each other every day.

common_mistakes: forgetting to use simple present tense

metadata.theme: friends, family together, simple social interactions, spending time together

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your family tree. Describe your parents, grandparents, and any other close relatives.
guiding_points: Point 1: Introduce your parents and describe their jobs.
Point 2: Mention your grandparents and where they live.
Point 3: Describe any other close relatives, such as siblings or cousins.

model_answer.text: My mother works in a school. My father is a doctor. I live with my grandparents in a big house. They are very kind to me. We spend a lot of time together as a family. I love my family very much. We help each other every day. My family makes me feel happy and safe. I think this is very good.

grammar_points: simple present tense for describing family relationships

metadata.theme: family relationships, parents, siblings, grandparents, extended family

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about giving directions to a friend in a town. Tell your friend how to get to the town hall from your house.
guiding_points: Mention the direction you will take from your house
Describe the main road or street you will walk on
Include a landmark or a feature that will help your friend recognize the town hall

model_answer.text: I will walk with my friend to the town hall. We will go straight from my house. We will walk down Main Street. The town hall is on the right, near the big clock. This is one of my favorite activities. I do this when I have free time. It makes me feel happy and relaxed. I often do this with my friends.

metadata.theme: giving directions in town, left, right, straight, finding places in town

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about a place you want to visit. Describe where it is, what you want to do, and why you want to go.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe the place you want to visit (e.g. beach, city, mountain)
Point 2: Mention what you want to do there (e.g. swim, sightsee, hike)
Point 3: Explain why you want to visit this place (e.g. relax, learn, have fun)

model_answer.text: I want to visit Paris, France. I want to see the Eiffel Tower and the Louvre Museum. I want to eat croissants and drink coffee in a café. I want to visit Paris because I love art and history. Animals are interesting to watch and study. I like taking care of animals. They are cute and friendly creatures. I enjoy spending time with animals.

metadata.theme: planning a trip, where to go, simple travel intentions, vacation ideas

exercise.instruction: Imagine you are walking in a new city and you are lost. Write a paragraph to ask for help.
guiding_points: Point 1: Where are you trying to go?
Point 2: What do you see around you?
Point 3: Ask for help to find your destination

model_answer.text: I am looking for the train station. I see a big park on my left. I need to find the main road to get to the station. Can you tell me which way to go?. Animals are interesting to watch and study. I like taking care of animals. They are cute and friendly creatures. I enjoy spending time with animals.
grammar_focus: present simple for asking for directions

grammar_points: use of present simple for asking for directions

metadata.theme: asking and giving directions, locations, where is the..., turn left/right

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your daily commute to school. Describe how you get to school and what you do on the way.
guiding_points: Describe how you get to school (bus, car, walking)
Mention what you do on the way to school (listen to music, read a book, eat a snack)
Include one thing you like about your daily commute

model_answer.text: I walk to school every day. I like to listen to music on my phone. I also read a book to learn new words. My daily walk helps me feel healthy. I go to school five days a week. I like learning new things at school. My teachers are very kind and helpful. I have many friends at school. I think this is very good.

grammar_points: use of simple adjectives to describe daily activities
common_mistakes: forgetting to use the present simple tense for daily habits

metadata.theme: bus, car, walking, how to get to places, commuting, going to school/work

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your favorite shop in town. Describe what you buy there and why you like it.
guiding_points: Point 1: Mention the name of your favorite shop
Point 2: Describe the things you buy in this shop
Point 3: Explain why you like this shop

model_answer.text: My favorite shop is the toy shop on Main Street. I buy toys and games there. I like this shop because it has many interesting toys. My sister likes the dolls they sell. This is one of my favorite activities. I do this when I have free time. It makes me feel happy and relaxed. I often do this with my friends.

common_mistakes: forgetting to use the present simple tense

metadata.theme: going shopping, buying things, shops in town, market visit

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your free time activities after school. What do you like to do? What is your favorite hobby? Describe one of your favorite things to do in your free time.
guiding_points: Point 1: mention one of your favorite hobbies
Point 2: describe what you like to do in your free time
Point 3: include a specific activity you enjoy doing after school

model_answer.text: I like to play football after school. My favorite hobby is playing football with my friends. We play in a park near my house. I like to run fast and kick the ball. I go to school five days a week. I like learning new things at school. My teachers are very kind and helpful. I have many friends at school.

metadata.theme: free time activities, what I like to do, leisure time, after school/work

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your weekend routine. Describe what you do on Saturday and Sunday.
guiding_points: Mention what you do on Saturday morning
Describe your favorite activity on Sunday afternoon
Include what you do on Sunday evening

model_answer.text: I wake up at nine o'clock on Saturday. I go to the park with my friends. We play football and run around. On Sunday, I watch a movie in the evening. I do this every morning before I go to school. This is part of my daily routine. I like to start my day this way. It helps me feel ready for the day.

common_mistakes: using the wrong tense (e.g. past tense instead of present tense)

metadata.theme: weekend activities, Saturday and Sunday plans, weekend routine

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about choosing a toy for a birthday party. What kind of toys do children like? What games do they play with friends?
guiding_points: Point 1: Mention a popular toy for children, e.g. doll, car, ball
Point 2: Describe a game that children like to play, e.g. tag, hide-and-seek, soccer
Point 3: Include a simple detail about why children like playing with toys, e.g. because they are fun, easy to play

model_answer.text: Children like to play with dolls. They also like to play soccer with their friends. I think children like toys because they are fun. They are easy to play with and make children happy. This is one of my favorite activities. I do this when I have free time. It makes me feel happy and relaxed. I often do this with my friends.
grammar_focus: use of the present simple tense

grammar_points: use of the present simple tense

metadata.theme: toys, games, playing, children activities, choosing toys, favorite games

exercise.instruction: Write about your favorite activities on Saturday mornings.
guiding_points: Point 1: What do you like to do first on Saturday morning?
Point 2: Do you like playing a sport or listening to music?
Point 3: What is your favorite thing to do after breakfast?

model_answer.text: I like to go for a run on Saturday morning. I listen to music while I run. My favorite song is 'Happy' by Pharrell Williams. I run for 30 minutes and then I eat breakfast. I do this every morning before I go to school. This is part of my daily routine. I like to start my day this way.

grammar_points: use of simple sentence structure for clarity

metadata.theme: hobbies, weekend interests, favorite activities, sports, reading, music

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about going to a clothing shop. Describe what you see and do.
guiding_points: Describe the shop's exterior and interior.
Mention what you see in the shop, such as clothes and sizes.
Tell about trying on clothes and asking for help.

model_answer.text: I go to a big clothing shop. I see many clothes on the shelves. They have sizes from small to large. I try on a shirt and ask the saleswoman for help. I like wearing comfortable clothes. These clothes are good for this season. I choose my clothes every morning. My clothes make me feel good. I think this is very good.

grammar_points: using simple present tense for actions that are true in general
using basic prepositions (in, on) to describe location
common_mistakes: forgetting to use a verb, e.g. 'I see clothes on the shelves.' instead of 'I see many clothes on the shelves.'

metadata.theme: buying clothes, shop vocabulary, sizes, trying on clothes, shopping experience

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your favorite outfit. Describe what you wear, where you wear it, and why you like it.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe the type of clothes you wear in your favorite outfit (e.g. t-shirt, dress, jeans)
Point 2: Mention where you wear your favorite outfit (e.g. school, park, home)
Point 3: Explain why you like wearing your favorite outfit (e.g. it's comfortable, it's fun)

model_answer.text: I like to wear a yellow t-shirt on Fridays. I wear it to school with my friends. We like to wear yellow to show our team spirit. It makes me feel happy and confident. I like wearing comfortable clothes. These clothes are good for this season. I choose my clothes every morning. My clothes make me feel good. I think this is very good.

metadata.theme: describing my clothes, what I wear, my wardrobe, favorite outfit

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about a person's favorite colorful outfit.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe the main color of the outfit.
Point 2: Mention one bright color used in the outfit.
Point 3: Say why the person likes this outfit.

model_answer.text: My favorite outfit is red and yellow. I like the yellow shirt because it is bright. The red skirt is also very nice. I wear this outfit to school on Fridays. I like wearing comfortable clothes. These clothes are good for this season. I choose my clothes every morning. My clothes make me feel good. I think this is very good.

metadata.theme: colors and clothes, describing appearance, bright colors, matching colors

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your daily dressing routine.
guiding_points: Mention the time you wake up in the morning.
Describe what you do first when you wake up.
Include what you wear to school or work.

model_answer.text: I wake up at 7:00 am every morning. I take a shower and get dressed. I wear a white shirt and blue jeans to school. I like to wear comfortable shoes. I do this every morning before I go to school. This is part of my daily routine. I like to start my day this way. It helps me feel ready for the day.

grammar_points: present simple tense for daily routines
common_mistakes: using the wrong tense (e.g., past simple for daily routines), not using articles correctly

metadata.theme: putting on clothes, daily dressing routine, getting ready, wearing clothes

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about the clothes you wear in summer and winter.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe the type of clothes you wear in summer.
Point 2: Mention the type of clothes you wear in winter.
Point 3: Explain why you wear these clothes in their respective seasons.

model_answer.text: In summer, I wear short T-shirts and shorts. In winter, I wear long coats and warm sweaters. I wear these clothes because it's hot in summer and cold in winter. This makes me feel comfortable all the time. The weather is different every day. I like this kind of weather very much. People dress differently in this weather. It is nice to go outside when the weather is good.

grammar_points: use of simple present tense for habits and routines
common_mistakes: forgetting to include both summer and winter clothes
using incorrect articles or verb tenses

metadata.theme: clothes for seasons, summer and winter wear, warm and cool clothes

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your favorite shirt. Describe the shirt, its material, and where you wear it.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe the color and style of your favorite shirt
Point 2: Mention the material of your favorite shirt
Point 3: Say where you wear your favorite shirt

model_answer.text: My favorite shirt is blue and short-sleeved. It is made of cotton and feels soft. I wear it to the beach with my friends. We like to swim and play games together. I like wearing comfortable clothes. These clothes are good for this season. I choose my clothes every morning. My clothes make me feel good. I think this is very good.

grammar_points: using the simple present tense for habits and preferences

metadata.theme: describing clothes, materials, styles, patterns, new and old clothes

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about the weather today. What is the weather like now? Is it sunny, rainy, cloudy, hot or cold?
guiding_points: Describe the weather today (sunny, rainy, cloudy, hot, cold)
Mention the time of day (morning, afternoon, evening)
Include a simple detail about what you can see or do outside

model_answer.text: It is sunny today. I wake up at seven o'clock in the morning. I see a big cloud in the sky. I like to walk in the park when it is sunny. This is one of my favorite things to eat. I enjoy this food very much. It tastes very good and delicious. I often eat this with my family.

grammar_points: simple present tense for weather descriptions
common_mistakes: using present continuous tense for weather descriptions

metadata.theme: describing weather today, sunny, rainy, cloudy, hot, cold, outside now

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about what you wear on hot and cold days. Tell us your favorite clothes for each season.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe what you wear on hot summer days.
Point 2: Tell us your favorite cold-weather clothes.
Point 3: Explain what you wear on mild spring and autumn days.

model_answer.text: I wear a T-shirt on hot summer days. It's very comfortable. I like to wear a coat on cold winter days. It keeps me warm. I choose my clothes every morning. These clothes are good for this season. I like wearing comfortable clothes. My clothes make me feel good. This is important in my daily life. I do this regularly.

metadata.theme: clothes for different weather, hot and cold days, what to wear when

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about the weather in your city during summer. Describe the temperature and what people do when it's hot.
guiding_points: Mention the average temperature in your city during summer.
Describe what people do to stay cool when it's hot outside.
Include a simple detail about the weather, such as sunshine or rain.

model_answer.text: In my city, the temperature is 30 degrees Celsius in summer. People wear short clothes and sunglasses to stay cool. They also drink cold water and eat ice cream to cool down. On hot days, the sun shines brightly in the sky. This is one of my favorite things to eat. I enjoy this food very much. It tastes very good and delicious.

grammar_points: simple present tense for habitual actions
common_mistakes: using the wrong form of 'to be' verb for temperature
forgetting to use the word 'in' for temperature

metadata.theme: temperature, weather vocabulary, degrees, seasons description

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about the four seasons in my country. Describe the weather and the months when each season happens.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe the weather in spring
Point 2: Mention the months when summer happens and describe the weather
Point 3: Describe the weather in autumn and the months when it happens

model_answer.text: In my country, spring is a beautiful season. The weather is warm and sunny in March and April. Summer is hot and rainy in June, July and August. Autumn is cool and windy in September and October. This is one of my favorite things to eat. I enjoy this food very much. It tastes very good and delicious. I often eat this with my family.
grammar_focus: use of articles (a, the) with seasons and months

grammar_points: use of articles (a, the) with seasons and months
common_mistakes: forgetting to use articles with seasons and months

metadata.theme: four seasons, spring, summer, autumn, winter, months and weather

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about different weather conditions. Describe the weather on a typical day in your town.
guiding_points: Describe the weather in your town on a typical day.
Mention two or three different types of weather you experience.
Explain how people behave in each type of weather.

model_answer.text: It is often windy in my town. When it is windy, people take their umbrellas. On snowy days, children play in the park. They make snowmen and snowballs. This is one of my favorite things to eat. I enjoy this food very much. It tastes very good and delicious. I often eat this with my family. I think this is very good.

metadata.theme: types of weather, windy, snowy, foggy, stormy, different conditions

exercise.instruction: Imagine you are talking to a friend on a sunny day. Write a short paragraph about the weather and what you like to do on a sunny day.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe the weather you are talking about
Point 2: Mention something you like to do on a sunny day
Point 3: Add a simple detail about your daily routine

model_answer.text: I like sunny days. It's nice to go for a walk in the park. I can see the flowers and the trees. I also like to have a picnic with my family. This is one of my favorite things to eat. I enjoy this food very much. It tastes very good and delicious. I often eat this with my family.

metadata.theme: talking about weather, simple conversations, British small talk, daily chat

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your home. Tell us about the rooms and furniture.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe the living room. What is there?
Point 2: Mention the bedroom. What is special about it?
Point 3: Say something about the kitchen. What do you like about it?

model_answer.text: I live in a small apartment. The living room has a sofa and a TV. My bedroom is on the second floor. I like the big window in my room. I can see the park from my window. My kitchen has a big fridge and a stove. I like to cook dinner in the evening. My home is a comfortable place to live.

metadata.theme: describing my house or apartment, rooms, home sweet home, living place

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your bedroom. Describe the furniture and decorations.
guiding_points: Mention the bed and mattress
Describe the color of the walls and any pictures on them
Tell about a favorite item in your room

model_answer.text: My bedroom is a quiet place. I have a big bed with a soft mattress. The walls are painted blue and there are some nice pictures on them. I like my favorite bookshelf with many interesting books. My home is a comfortable place to live. I like spending time in my house. It is a nice place to relax after school.

grammar_points: simple present tense for describing habits or facts

metadata.theme: my bedroom, furniture, personal space, my own room, decorating

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your bedroom. Describe the furniture and objects you see. Mention the things that are on your desk and bed.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe your bed and what's on it
Point 2: Talk about the furniture in your bedroom
Point 3: Mention one object on your desk or bed

model_answer.text: I have a big bed in my bedroom. It's brown and has a white blanket. My desk is near the bed. I have a lamp on my desk. It helps me see my books at night. My home is a comfortable place to live. I like spending time in my house. It is a nice place to relax after school.

metadata.theme: bed, desk, wardrobe, bedroom objects, lamp, mirror, details

exercise.instruction: Write about the things you find in a kitchen. Think about what people use to cook and eat food.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe a kitchen table and what you can find on it
Point 2: Mention a kitchen appliance that you use to cook food
Point 3: Talk about a common food that people eat in the kitchen

model_answer.text: I have a kitchen table. It is in the middle of the room. I put my books and phone on it. I also put my food on it when I eat. I use a stove to cook my food. It is a big machine that helps me make yummy things. My favorite food is pizza. I eat it with my family in the kitchen.

common_mistakes: forgetting to use the present simple tense

metadata.theme: kitchen objects, cooking, eating area, fridge, table, making food

exercise.instruction: Write about your favorite food. What do you like to eat? Why do you like it?
guiding_points: Mention your favorite food (e.g. pizza, ice cream, sushi)
Describe why you like this food (e.g. taste, smell, texture)
Add a simple detail about how you eat this food (e.g. with family, in a restaurant)

model_answer.text: My favorite food is pizza. I like pizza because it is tasty. I eat pizza with my family on Fridays. We go to a restaurant near my house and order a big pizza. This is one of my favorite things to eat. I enjoy this food very much. It tastes very good and delicious. I often eat this with my family.

common_mistakes: forgetting to use simple present tense

metadata.theme: favorite foods, likes and dislikes, tasty food, yum, delicious

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about what you eat for breakfast. Describe your favorite breakfast food and how you like to eat it.
guiding_points: Point 1: Mention your favorite breakfast food (e.g. cereal, toast, eggs)
Point 2: Describe how you like to eat your breakfast (e.g. with milk, with butter, with family)
Point 3: Add a simple detail about your breakfast routine (e.g. at home, in the morning, with a cup of tea)

model_answer.text: I like to eat toast for breakfast. I put butter on my toast and eat it with my family. We eat breakfast together every morning. Then I drink a glass of orange juice and get ready for school. I do this every morning before I go to school. This is part of my daily routine. I like to start my day this way.
grammar_focus: use of the present simple tense

grammar_points: use of the present simple tense for routines and habits
common_mistakes: forgetting to use the present simple tense

metadata.theme: morning meals, breakfast items, eating breakfast, cereal, toast, eggs

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your food preferences. What do you like to eat? Do you prefer sweet or salty foods? Do you eat healthy food every day?
guiding_points: Mention a food you like to eat
Describe whether it is sweet or salty
Explain why you like it

model_answer.text: I like to eat apples. They are sweet. I eat apples every day because they are good for my health. This is one of my favorite fruits to eat. I enjoy apples very much. They taste very good and delicious. I often eat apples with my family. I think apples are very good. It is important to eat healthy food.

common_mistakes: forgetting to use the verb 'to be' in the simple present tense

metadata.theme: what I like to eat, healthy food, tastes, sweet, salty, preferences

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about making a sandwich. Describe the steps and ingredients you use.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe the first step in making a sandwich, like cutting the bread.
Point 2: Mention two ingredients you use in your sandwich, such as cheese and ham.
Point 3: Explain how you put the ingredients together in your sandwich.

model_answer.text: I cut the bread to make two slices. I use cheese and ham in my sandwich. I put the cheese on one slice and the ham on the other. Then I put them together and cut the sandwich. This is one of my favorite things to eat. I enjoy this food very much. It tastes very good and delicious. I often eat this with my family.

grammar_points: using basic prepositions like on and in
common_mistakes: forgetting to use the article 'the' before 'bread'
using the wrong verb tense for actions

metadata.theme: making food, sandwich ingredients, steps, bread, cheese, ham, vegetables

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about what you eat for breakfast every day.
guiding_points: Point 1: Mention the time you wake up in the morning
Point 2: Describe what you eat for breakfast
Point 3: Include a simple detail about your favorite drink or habit

model_answer.text: I wake up at 7 o'clock every morning. I eat breakfast with my family. We have toast, eggs, and orange juice. Then I drink a glass of milk to get strong. I do this every morning before I go to school. This is part of my daily routine. I like to start my day this way. It helps me feel ready for the day.
grammar_focus: use of the present simple tense

common_mistakes: forgetting to include time or family in the paragraph

metadata.theme: meals, beverages, eating habits, drinking water, juice, milk

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about what you eat for lunch at school.
guiding_points: Point 1: What do you eat for lunch every day?
Point 2: Do you eat in the school cafeteria or at your desk?
Point 3: What is your favorite lunch food at school?

model_answer.text: I eat a sandwich for lunch every day at school. My friends and I sit in the cafeteria. I like to eat a sandwich with a salad on the side. This is one of my favorite things to eat. I enjoy this food very much. It tastes very good and delicious. I often eat this with my family. I think this is very good.

grammar_points: use of simple present tense for routine activities
common_mistakes: forgetting to use the preposition in

metadata.theme: midday meals, lunch at home or school, sandwich, soup, salad

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about making a simple sandwich. Describe the ingredients and the steps to make it.
guiding_points: Point 1: Mention two main ingredients of the sandwich
Point 2: Describe the first step to make the sandwich
Point 3: Mention one additional ingredient to add to the sandwich

model_answer.text: To make a sandwich, you need two slices of bread and some cheese. First, put the cheese on one slice of bread. Then, put the other slice on top of the cheese. I also add some tomato to my sandwich. This is one of my favorite things to eat. I enjoy this food very much. It tastes very good and delicious.

grammar_points: using the present simple tense for recipes
common_mistakes: forgetting to use the present simple tense

metadata.theme: simple recipes, cooking steps, ingredients, how to make, instructions

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your favorite zoo animal. Tell us what it looks like and what it eats.
guiding_points: Mention the name of a zoo animal you like
Describe what it looks like (color, size, shape)
Tell us what it eats (food or plants)

model_answer.text: I like the monkeys at the zoo. They are brown and have long tails. They eat bananas and apples. We can see them playing in the trees every day. Animals are interesting to watch and study. I like taking care of animals. They are cute and friendly creatures. I enjoy spending time with animals. I think this is very good.

metadata.theme: animals at the zoo, wild animals, visiting zoo, lions, elephants, monkeys

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your pet at home. Describe what you do with your pet every day.
guiding_points: Mention the type of pet you have (e.g. dog, cat, fish, bird).
Describe one activity you do with your pet every day (e.g. feeding, playing, walking).
Include a simple detail about your pet's favorite thing (e.g. food, toy, place to sleep).

model_answer.text: I have a cat at home. I feed my cat every morning. My cat likes to sleep on the soft cushion. The cushion is in the living room. My home is a comfortable place to live. I like spending time in my house. It is a nice place to relax after school. I feel happy and safe in my home.

common_mistakes: forgetting to use the correct article (a/an/the) before the noun

metadata.theme: my pet, taking care of pets, animals at home, dog, cat, fish, bird

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about a farm. Describe the animals you see and the sounds they make.
guiding_points: Mention three animals you see on the farm
Describe what the animals look like
Include the sounds the animals make

model_answer.text: I visit a farm every weekend. I see cows, pigs, and chickens. The cows are big and brown. They make a loud 'moo' sound. The pigs are small and white. They make a funny 'oink' sound. The chickens are yellow and brown. They make a happy 'cluck' sound. Animals are interesting to watch and study. I like taking care of animals.

metadata.theme: common animals, describing animals, sounds, farm animals, pets, wild

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about a small town. Describe the places you can find in a small town.
guiding_points: Mention the bank in the town.
Describe what you can find in the post office.
Tell about a shop you like to visit in the town.

model_answer.text: I live in a small town. There is a bank in the town where I can change money. The post office is near the bank. I like to visit the bookshop because they have many interesting books. I like living in this place very much. There are many interesting things to see here. It is a nice place to walk around.

common_mistakes: forgetting to use the definite article 'the'

metadata.theme: places in town, bank, post office, shop, pharmacy, small town

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about a big city. Describe a place where you like to go.
guiding_points: Mention a cinema or a museum in the city.
Describe the building where you like to go.
Tell us about a fun thing you can do there.

model_answer.text: I like to go to the cinema in the city. The cinema is in a big building with many floors. I like to watch movies on a big screen. Animals are interesting to watch and study. I like taking care of animals. They are cute and friendly creatures. I enjoy spending time with animals. I think this is very good.

metadata.theme: big city locations, cinema, museum, park, mall, big buildings

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your visit to the park. Describe what you did and what you saw.
guiding_points: Point 1: Mention the day of the week you went to the park
Point 2: Describe the activities you did in the park
Point 3: Mention something you liked about the park

model_answer.text: I went to the park on Saturday. I played on the swings and slide. I also sat on a bench under a big tree. The park was very fun and I liked the grass. This is one of my favorite activities. I do this when I have free time. It makes me feel happy and relaxed. I often do this with my friends.

metadata.theme: going to the park, playground, activities, trees, benches, fun outside

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your town. Tell us where it is, how big it is, and what it is like.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe the location of your town (e.g. near a river, in a valley, on a hill)
Point 2: Tell us about the size of your town (e.g. small, big, quiet)
Point 3: Describe what your town is like (e.g. nice, beautiful, green)

model_answer.text: My town is in a valley. It is a small town. I like it because it is quiet and nice. There are many trees and a big park. I like living in this place very much. There are many interesting things to see here. It is a nice place to walk around. I know this area very well. I think this is very good.
grammar_focus: use of the in a valley
use of the in a sentence

grammar_points: use of the in a sentence
common_mistakes: forgetting to use the in a sentence

metadata.theme: describing my town, where I live, small place, quiet, nice town

exercise.instruction: Write about your city. Tell us what it is like. Describe the big city life.
guiding_points: Point 1: What is your city called?
Point 2: Is your city big or small?
Point 3: What do you like about big city life?

model_answer.text: My city is called Tokyo. It is a very big city. I like the busy streets and many people. The city is always exciting with bright lights and music. I like living in this place very much. There are many interesting things to see here. It is a nice place to walk around. I know this area very well. I think this is very good.
grammar_focus: use of 'is called' for proper nouns
simple present tense for general statements

grammar_points: use of 'is called' for proper nouns
simple present tense for general statements
common_mistakes: forgetting to use a/an or the with a noun
using present continuous tense instead of simple present

metadata.theme: describing my city, big city life, busy, exciting, many people

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about how you get around town.
guiding_points: Describe how you usually get to school.
Mention one way you like to travel around town.
Explain why you prefer this mode of transport.

model_answer.text: I get to school by bus every day. I like to walk to the park on the weekends. It's because I can see the flowers and birds. I feel happy when I walk. I like living in this place very much. There are many interesting things to see here. It is a nice place to walk around. I know this area very well.

metadata.theme: getting around town, bus, taxi, walking, bicycle, moving in town

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about how to find the city library. You are walking from the town hall.
guiding_points: Mention the starting point (town hall)
Describe the direction you need to go (straight or turn)
Include a landmark or a sign to help people find the library

model_answer.text: I start from the town hall. I go straight on Main Street. Then I turn left at the big sign that says 'Library'. The library is on my right. I like living in this place very much. There are many interesting things to see here. It is a nice place to walk around. I know this area very well. I think this is very good.

grammar_points: using simple present tense for directions
using directional words (straight, turn, left, right)

metadata.theme: where is..., finding places, simple navigation, go straight, turn here

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about a park in your town. Describe its location and some nearby places.
guiding_points: Mention the name of the park in your town.
Describe the location of the park in relation to other places, such as a river, a school, or a shopping center.
Tell about something interesting or fun you can do in the park.

model_answer.text: The park is near my school. I can walk there in five minutes. The park is next to a big river. In the park, I like to play soccer with my friends. Animals are interesting to watch and study. I like taking care of animals. They are cute and friendly creatures. I enjoy spending time with animals. I think this is very good.

metadata.theme: describing location, near, far, next to, behind, in front of, prepositions

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your skills. Describe what you can do well. Include three things you are good at.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe a skill related to sports or physical activities
Point 2: Mention a skill related to music or art
Point 3: Include a skill related to cooking or food

model_answer.text: I am good at playing soccer. I can run fast and kick the ball well. I also like to draw pictures and paint. I can make a delicious sandwich with turkey and cheese. This object is useful in my daily life. I use this thing very often. It is important to me. I like how it looks and works. I think this is very good.

common_mistakes: forgetting to use simple present tense

metadata.theme: what I can do, abilities, I can..., talents, things I am good at

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about a picture of a ball. Describe the ball's color, size, and shape.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe the color of the ball
Point 2: Mention the size of the ball (big or small)
Point 3: Describe the shape of the ball (round or square)

model_answer.text: The ball is red. It is small. The ball is round. It is fun to play with. I play with this ball every day. It is one of my favorite toys. I like to play ball games with my friends. This ball is very nice. I use this ball regularly. It makes me feel happy when I play with it.

grammar_points: using simple adjectives to describe objects

metadata.theme: describing things, color, size, shape, big, small, round, square

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your things at home. Describe your favorite bag, phone, and book. Include what you use them for and where you keep them.
guiding_points: Mention your favorite bag and its color
Describe your phone and what you use it for
Tell where you keep your favorite book at home

model_answer.text: I have a red bag. I use it to carry my things to school. My phone is black and I use it to talk to my friends. I keep my favorite book on a shelf in my bedroom. This object is useful in my daily life. I use this thing very often. It is important to me. I like how it looks and works.

common_mistakes: forgetting to include the definite article 'the'

metadata.theme: my possessions, objects I own, personal items, bag, phone, book

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about where you keep your books.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe where you keep your books at home.
Point 2: Mention the name of the book and the person who reads it.
Point 3: Explain how you keep the book safe and organized.

model_answer.text: I keep my books on the table in the living room. My sister likes to read 'The Little Prince'. She reads it every evening before bed. I help her keep the book under the chair so it's safe. I like living in this place very much. There are many interesting things to see here. It is a nice place to walk around.

metadata.theme: where things are, prepositions of place, on the table, under the chair

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your school day. What time do you wake up? What classes do you have? What subjects do you learn?
guiding_points: Mention your wake-up time and breakfast
Describe your classes and subjects
Include a simple detail about your school day, like a favorite subject or activity

model_answer.text: I wake up at eight o'clock every morning. I have English and math classes. I like to learn English because I can speak with my friends. Then I have a break and eat lunch with my friends. I do this every morning before I go to school. This is part of my daily routine. I like to start my day this way.

grammar_points: using the simple present tense to describe routines
using articles to describe specific classes
common_mistakes: forgetting to use the simple present tense

metadata.theme: my day at school, classes, timetable, subjects, learning

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about the classroom. Describe what you see when you enter the classroom. What are the main things you see?
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe the desk and chair
Point 2: Mention the blackboard or whiteboard
Point 3: Include the computer and map on the wall

model_answer.text: When I enter the classroom, I see a big desk in the front. There are two chairs for the teacher. The teacher writes on the blackboard with a piece of chalk. There is a computer on a table and a big map on the wall. My home is a comfortable place to live. I like spending time in my house.

metadata.theme: things in the classroom, desk, chair, board, computer, map

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your school bag. What do you carry in it?
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe the things you carry in your school bag.
Point 2: Mention the books you have in your bag.
Point 3: Tell us about the pencils and pens you use.

model_answer.text: I carry my school bag to school every day. My bag has a lot of books in it, like English and math books. I also have a pencil case with many pencils and pens. I use them to do my homework and take notes in class. I go to school five days a week. I like learning new things at school.

metadata.theme: my school bag, books, pencils, contents, what I carry

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your classroom. Describe where you sit and what is around you.
guiding_points: Point 1: Where is your desk in the classroom?
Point 2: What is on the walls of your classroom?
Point 3: Where do you keep your books and pencils?

model_answer.text: I sit near the window in my classroom. There is a big picture of the Earth on the wall. I keep my books and pencils in a box under my desk. My teacher writes on the board with a black pen. My home is a comfortable place to live. I like spending time in my house. It is a nice place to relax after school.

metadata.theme: describing the classroom, where I study, room layout, my place

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about the things you need in your pencil case at school.
guiding_points: Point 1: Think about the things you need to write and draw at school.
Point 2: Describe the objects you put in your pencil case, such as pens, pencils, and erasers.
Point 3: Think about how you organize your pencil case to find things easily.

model_answer.text: I put my pens and pencils in my pencil case. My pencil case is red and has a zipper. I also put my eraser and sharpener in it. I like to put my favourite pen at the top so I can find it easily. I go to school five days a week. I like learning new things at school. My teachers are very kind and helpful.

common_mistakes: forgetting to use the verb 'put' to describe actions

metadata.theme: school supplies, pen, ruler, eraser, pencil case, scissors, glue

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about introducing yourself to a friend and asking simple questions.
guiding_points: Mention your name and age.
Describe how you greet your friend when you meet.
Ask a simple question to your friend, such as 'How are you?'

model_answer.text: My name is Maria. I am 16 years old. When I meet my friend, I say 'Hello!' and give her a hug. I ask her, 'How are you?' She says she is happy and we talk about our weekend. I like meeting new people. It is nice to make new friends. I enjoy talking with others. Being friendly is important to me.

metadata.theme: introducing myself, asking simple questions, greetings, hello, how are you, name

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your favorite toy. Tell how many toys you have and what they are.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe your favorite toy and its color.
Point 2: Mention how many toys you have in total.
Point 3: Tell what other toys are in the same color as your favorite toy.

model_answer.text: I have 5 toys in my room. My favorite toy is a red teddy bear. I have 2 other red toys, a red ball and a red car. They are all fun to play with. I like learning about numbers and colors. This is easy to remember and understand. I use this knowledge every day. It is fun to count and name colors.

metadata.theme: numbers 1-100, counting, basic math, how many, quantity

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your favorite color. What color is it? Why do you like it? What things are this color?
guiding_points: Mention your favorite color
Explain why you like this color
Describe something that is this color

model_answer.text: My favorite color is blue. I like it because it is a happy color. The sky is blue on sunny days. I see blue everywhere in my life. I have many blue things in my room. Blue makes me feel calm and happy. I like learning about different colors. Blue is the best color for me. I love the color blue very much.

metadata.theme: basic colors, naming colors, red, blue, green, yellow, favorite color

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your favorite colorful objects in your room.
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe a colorful object in your room, such as a rug or a picture.
Point 2: Mention the colors of this object, like red, blue, or yellow.
Point 3: Add a simple detail about where you can find this object in your room.

model_answer.text: I have a colorful rug in my room. It is red and blue. The rug is under my bed. My friends like to sit on it when they visit me. My home is a comfortable place to live. I like spending time in my house. It is a nice place to relax after school. I feel happy and safe in my home.

common_mistakes: forgetting to use simple present tense

metadata.theme: describing colors of things around me, my colorful room, world colors

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your birthday and age. Tell us how old you are and what you do on your birthday.
guiding_points: Point 1: mention your age and how old you are
Point 2: describe what you do on your birthday
Point 3: include the day of the week your birthday is on

model_answer.text: I am five years old. My birthday is on Sunday. I have a big party with my friends and family. We eat cake and play games together. I like learning about numbers and colors. This is easy to remember and understand. I use this knowledge every day. It is fun to count and name colors. I think this is very good.

common_mistakes: forgetting to use the correct form of 'to be' (am, is, are)

metadata.theme: saying age, how old are you, numbers, birthday, years old

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about a shopping trip. Tell us about something you bought, how much it cost, and if it was expensive or cheap.
guiding_points: Mention a specific item you bought, like a shirt or a book.
Describe how much it cost and if it was expensive or cheap.
Tell us if you liked the item and if you would buy it again.

model_answer.text: I bought a new pen yesterday. It cost 5 dollars. I think it's cheap. I like to write with it and I will buy another one. I like going shopping with my family. It is fun to buy new things. I help my parents when we go shopping. We go to the store every week. I think this is very good.

metadata.theme: prices, shopping, how much, cost, money, buying, cheap, expensive

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about the three red apples and two blue pens on my desk.
guiding_points: Mention the number of red apples and their color
Describe the pens, including their number and color
Add a simple detail about what you see or think about the objects

model_answer.text: I have three red apples on my desk. They are very juicy. Two blue pens are also on my desk. I think I will use them to write a letter. I like learning about numbers and colors. This is easy to remember and understand. I use this knowledge every day. It is fun to count and name colors. I think this is very good.

metadata.theme: combining numbers and colors, descriptions, three red apples, two blue pens

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about your last shopping trip. What did you buy? Where did you go? What did you need and want?
guiding_points: Point 1: Describe a store you went to (e.g. supermarket, mall, market)
Point 2: Mention something you needed to buy (e.g. food, clothes, toys)
Point 3: Say what you wanted to buy but didn't have enough money for

model_answer.text: I went to the supermarket with my mom last week. We needed to buy some bread and milk. I also wanted to buy a new toy, but it was too expensive. We bought some apples and oranges instead. I like going shopping with my family. It is fun to buy new things. I help my parents when we go shopping.

grammar_points: use of simple present tense to describe a routine action
use of articles (a/an/the) to describe specific objects

metadata.theme: shopping trip, buying things, stores, going to buy, need and want

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your last visit to a supermarket. Describe what you did and what you bought.
guiding_points: Point 1: What you saw when you entered the supermarket
Point 2: What you put in your shopping cart
Point 3: What happened at the checkout

model_answer.text: I went to the supermarket with my mom. We walked down the big aisle with many shelves. We put some bread and milk in our cart. Then we went to the checkout and paid with a card. This is one of my favorite things to eat. I enjoy this food very much. It tastes very good and delicious. I often eat this with my family.

metadata.theme: supermarket shopping, food shopping, cart, shelves, products, checkout

exercise.instruction: Write a paragraph about making a shopping list. Think about what you need to buy and how you can organize it.
guiding_points: Point 1: Write about what you need to buy (food, toiletries, etc.)
Point 2: Describe how you can organize your shopping list (alphabetical order, categories, etc.)
Point 3: Mention a simple detail about your shopping plan (e.g., going to the store at a specific time)

model_answer.text: I make a shopping list every week. I write down what I need to buy, like milk and bread. I organize my list in alphabetical order so it's easy to find what I need. Then, I go to the store on Saturday morning. I like going shopping with my family. It is fun to buy new things. I help my parents when we go shopping.

grammar_points: use of the present tense for regular actions
common_mistakes: forgetting to include the main idea (shopping list)

metadata.theme: making a list, what to buy, planning, items needed, organize shopping

exercise.instruction: Write a short paragraph about your daily routine and what time you do things.
guiding_points: Mention what time you wake up in the morning
Describe what you do after waking up
Include what time you have breakfast and what you eat

model_answer.text: I wake up at seven o'clock every morning. Then I get out of bed and wash my face. I eat breakfast at eight o'clock with my family. We have toast and drink orange juice. I do this every morning before I go to school. This is part of my daily routine. I like to start my day this way. It helps me feel ready for the day.

metadata.theme: clock, time, what time is it, daily schedule, hours, minutes, o'clock
